src:
b = body()
for name, color in [('A','#111'),('B','#222'),('C','#333')]:
    box = create_element('div')
    set_attribute(box, 'class', 'box')
    set_attribute(box, 'style', f'background:{color}')
    label = create_element('span')
    set_text(label, f'{name} {color}')
    append_child(box, label)
    append_child(b, box)
print(len([h for h in children(b).split(',') if h]))

btn = create_element('button')
set_text(btn, 'Clicked 0 times')
append_child(body(), btn)
bind_event(btn, 'click', 'click')
click(btn)
ev = receive()
print('"msg":"click"' in ev)
set_text(btn, 'Clicked 1 time')
print(get_text(btn))

grid = create_element('div')
append_child(body(), grid)
add = create_element('button')
append_child(body(), add)
bind_event(add, 'click', 'add')
click(add)
ev = receive()
if '"msg":"add"' in ev:
    swatch = create_element('div')
    append_child(grid, swatch)
print(tag_name(last_child(grid)))

inp = create_element('input')
append_child(body(), inp)
set_value(inp, '#ff0080')
print(get_value(inp))
set_value(inp, '')
print(get_value(inp) == '')

el = create_element('div')
append_child(body(), el)
h = animate(el, '[{"opacity":0},{"opacity":1}]', '{"duration":30}', 'done')
ev = receive()
print('"msg":"done"' in ev, '"ok":true' in ev, f'"animation_handle":{h}' in ev)
